title: agrostis forsteri
intro: Agrostis forsteri, also known as Forster's bent-grass or Forster's grass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Agrostis forsteri has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
